rejection_reasons.finding: All three center on incremental UTF-8 decoding plus logical record framing across arbitrary byte chunks. The Python and Node cases are direct NDJSON/JSON-sequence replays, and the Dart case is the same transport/framing mechanism with quoted delimited records. This is expressly excluded and is also a three-language semantic duplicate.

Both repairs require invalidating stale derived configuration after a live update and correctly distinguishing removal/inheritance from an ordinary override. Retain py_config_reload and replace node_worker_env_reconfigure to remove the cross-language mechanism replay.

case_oracle_final_schema.finding: Every artifact has the exact authored top-level schema, matching case/file identifiers, and exactly one test file in each tier.

ownership.finding: Every case has 2-3 unique candidate source owners; every candidate exists in repo_files; expected_files equals candidate_paths; and expected_files count is within max_files.

tier_isolation.finding: Public, feedback, and final test paths are pairwise disjoint in every case. Each final tier exercises an additional boundary beyond feedback.

safety_dependencies.finding: No case requires network access, premium services, unsafe operations, package installation, or non-runtime production dependencies. Pytest is used only as the declared test harness.

author_attestations.finding: All four authors attest assigned-directory-only work, no repository/history/prior-result access, no conversation-history use for case content, no internet access, and no CHILI model calls.

baseline_execution.method: Each case-tier combination was materialized and invoked independently in a fresh directory beneath D:\dev\chili-twelfth-validation\_runs. Only the selected tier test was invoked. The entire disposable run tree was removed before receipt creation.

feedback.detail: dart process failed at retired-release reader retention

final.detail: dart process failed at independent retired-generation retention

feedback.detail: dart process failed at split UTF-8 code point

final.detail: dart process failed at quoted embedded newline framing

feedback.detail: dart process failed at IPv4 CIDR membership

final.detail: dart process failed at IPv6 CIDR membership

case_findings.mechanism: Live configuration replacement, derived endpoint rebinding, and default restoration for omitted overrides.

tier_fairness.final_boundary: Removal of prior overrides and empty replacement reset defaults, beyond feedback's changed-prefix rebinding.

case_findings.mechanism: Incremental NDJSON parsing across arbitrary chunks, split UTF-8 sequences, and terminal flushing.

tier_fairness.final_boundary: Valid unterminated final record and idempotent terminal flush.

case_findings.correction_request: Replace the complete case/oracle/final triple with a new Python data case unrelated to byte-chunk decoding, UTF-8 carryover, delimiter or record framing, JSON sequences, or terminal stream flushing. Keep the authored schemas, 2-4 candidate owners, feasible expected_files/max_files, disjoint tiers, the required baseline pattern, and a materially new final boundary. Update the Python attestation and exact_files list.

case_findings.mechanism: Checkpoint provenance tied to file identity with replacement and in-place truncation reconciliation.

tier_fairness.final_boundary: Same-identity truncation with an offset beyond EOF, distinct from replacement-file provenance.

case_findings.mechanism: Incremental NDJSON ingestion across arbitrary byte chunks, split UTF-8 sequences, and terminal decoder flush/error handling.

tier_fairness.final_boundary: Malformed terminal UTF-8 rejection beyond split-scalar and unterminated-record feedback.

case_findings.correction_request: Replace the complete case/oracle/final triple with a new Node ESM data case unrelated to byte-chunk decoding, UTF-8 carryover, delimiter or record framing, NDJSON or JSON sequences, or terminal stream flushing. case_findings.mechanism: Request-scoped immutable policy generation across an asynchronous identity lookup, with matching audit provenance.

tier_fairness.final_boundary: Absent-route insertion during lookup exercises the missing-rule branch and opposite transition direction from role revocation.

case_findings.mechanism: Live layered environment reconfiguration, stale prepared-state invalidation, and null/undefined removal versus inheritance semantics.

tier_fairness.final_boundary: Per-launch suppression with null, inheritance with undefined, and empty-string preservation.

case_findings.correction_request: Replace the complete case/oracle/final triple with a new Node ESM config case that does not use runtime reload or reconfigure, cached or derived configuration invalidation, override omission/removal/inheritance, or layered environment semantics. Keep the authored schemas, 2-4 candidate owners, feasible expected_files/max_files, disjoint tiers, the required baseline pattern, and a materially new final boundary. Update the Node attestation and exact_files list.

case_findings.mechanism: Generation-specific reader accounting with deferred reclamation of retired immutable releases and idempotent handle closure.

tier_fairness.final_boundary: Multiple readers across multiple retired generations plus repeated closure accounting.

case_findings.mechanism: Incremental UTF-8 byte decoding and quoted delimited-record framing across arbitrary chunks and CRLF boundaries.

tier_fairness.final_boundary: Quoted embedded newlines, split CRLF, and malformed terminal UTF-8.

case_findings.correction_request: Replace the complete case/oracle/final triple with a new Dart data case unrelated to byte-chunk decoding, UTF-8 carryover, delimiter or record framing, quoted multiline records, JSON sequences, CRLF chunk boundaries, or terminal stream flushing. Keep the authored schemas, 2-4 candidate owners, feasible expected_files/max_files, disjoint tiers, the required baseline pattern, and a materially new final boundary. Update the Dart attestation and exact_files list.

case_findings.mechanism: IPv4/IPv6 CIDR trust matching and hop-aligned forwarded-origin selection at the first untrusted boundary.

tier_fairness.final_boundary: IPv6 CIDR membership and IPv6 forwarded chain alignment beyond IPv4 feedback.

case_findings.mechanism: Tri-state hierarchical configuration with retained NULL provenance and explicit false precedence.

tier_fairness.final_boundary: Workspace-to-system inheritance edge beyond member-to-workspace feedback.

case_findings.mechanism: Composite tenant ownership enforced by relational identity and tenant-aligned projection joins.

tier_fairness.final_boundary: Parent deletion and identity mutation under existing child stock beyond child insertion and projection feedback.

case_findings.mechanism: Stored active-count trigger maintenance across archive/restore/project transitions with matching active-only dashboard projection.

tier_fairness.final_boundary: Archived moves and combined restore-plus-reassignment transition composition.
